channel.title: Posts on Blueprint Analytics
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Blueprint Analytics

item.title: Research Design
item.description: I will assist you in developing a blueprint for your research. I will advise you on defining a clear and answerable research question, and on the choice of study type, data collection methodologies, and statistical analyses for your research.

item.title: Data Analysis
item.description: We will analyse your data from start to finish. We clean the data, generate graphical and numeric summaries, and undertake statistical inference testing. All analysis are presented in a comprehensive report that includes interpretations of the statistics and how to report the results.

item.title: Data presentation and reporting
item.description: I have solutions for effectively presenting your data, whether you need a table or a choropleth map. I customise the style, format, and functionality of the my reports, and standalone plots and tables according to your needs. Do you need black-and-white versions for a print journal and full-colour versions for a presentation? Do you want a report with interactive or animated plots for your website? I have you covered.

item.title: Open data workflows
item.description: I specialise in developing workflows for reproducible research and open data using open-source software and platforms.

item.title: Training
item.description: If you or people in your organization need training, I create courses and content that suit your needs in the areas of research methods, interpreting data, reporting and presenting data, and training on the use of the R statistical environment, and open-research tools.
